scripts.dev: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs dev && node scripts/dev-runner.mjs watch
scripts.dev:watch: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs dev:watch && node scripts/dev-runner.mjs watch
scripts.dev:once: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs dev:once && node scripts/dev-runner.mjs dev
scripts.paperclipai: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs paperclipai && node cli/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs cli/src/index.ts
scripts.docs:dev: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs docs:dev && cd docs && npx mintlify dev
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs test:e2e && npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs test:e2e:headed && npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.evals:smoke: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs evals:smoke && cd evals/promptfoo && npx promptfoo@0.103.3 eval
scripts.test:release-smoke: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs test:release-smoke && npx playwright test --config tests/release-smoke/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:release-smoke:headed: node scripts/check-supported-node.mjs test:release-smoke:headed && npx playwright test --config tests/release-smoke/playwright.config.ts --headed
